landing.trust.title: Aamy.ai · The AI Receptionist for Your Business
landing.trust.subtitle: Aamy answers calls, replies to messages, books appointments, and remembers every customer while following the way your business operates.
landing.capabilities.title: Everything you need to serve your customers automatically
landing.capabilities.subtitle: Answer calls, reply to messages, book appointments, remember customers, and manage everything from one place.
landing.how.title: Getting started is easy
landing.how.subtitle: We configure your business, connect your channels, and Aamy starts serving customers using your services, business hours, and policies.
landing.results.title: More customers served. Less manual work.
landing.results.subtitle: While you're running your business, Aamy answers calls, replies to messages, books appointments, and keeps everything organized.
landing.compare.title: Much more than a chatbot
landing.compare.subtitle: Aamy combines AI phone calls, messaging, CRM, appointment booking, and automation into one powerful platform.
landing.compare.note: * Some features on other platforms require third-party tools, additional integrations, or advanced configuration.
landing.testimonials.title: Businesses Growing with Aamy
landing.final.title: Start serving customers 24/7 with Aamy
landing.final.subtitle: Answer calls, reply to messages, book appointments, remember every customer, and manage your business from one place.
landing.final.tip: We configure Aamy using your real business information.
landing.system.title: Your entire business running from one platform
landing.system.subtitle: Calls, messages, customers, appointments, CRM, and AI reports working together to deliver fast and professional customer service.
landing.system.cards.1.title: Remembers Every Customer
landing.system.cards.1.desc: Aamy keeps every customer's history so every conversation continues naturally.
landing.system.cards.2.title: Learns Your Business
landing.system.cards.2.desc: Works using your services, business hours, policies, and the way you want to serve your customers.
landing.system.cards.3.title: Books Appointments Automatically
landing.system.cards.3.desc: Checks availability, suggests time slots, and confirms appointments automatically.
landing.howNew.title: From setup to automation
landing.howNew.subtitle: In just a few steps, Aamy is ready to serve customers like a member of your team.
landing.howNew.steps.1.title: We configure your business
landing.howNew.steps.1.desc: Services, business hours, policies, FAQs, and everything needed to get started.
landing.howNew.steps.2.title: We connect your channels
landing.howNew.steps.2.desc: WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook, phone calls, and calendar working together.
landing.howNew.steps.3.title: Customers interact naturally
landing.howNew.steps.3.desc: Aamy answers questions, books appointments, and remembers every customer without changing how people communicate.
landing.howNew.steps.4.title: Everything stays organized
landing.howNew.steps.4.desc: Customers, conversations, appointments, and reports available from one dashboard.
landing.context.title: Aamy learns how your business works
landing.context.subtitle: Every business is different. Aamy uses your information to provide accurate answers and consistent customer service.
landing.context.cards.1.title: Your Services
landing.context.cards.1.desc: Explains your services correctly and guides customers to the right option.
landing.context.cards.2.title: Your Availability
landing.context.cards.2.desc: Checks real availability and books appointments automatically.
landing.context.cards.3.title: Your Policies
landing.context.cards.3.desc: Follows deposits, cancellations, service areas, and any rules defined by your business.
landing.context.cards.4.title: Your Brand Voice
landing.context.cards.4.desc: Communicates using your preferred tone and automatically detects your customer's language.
landing.example.title: See how Aamy talks to your customers
landing.example.subtitle: Natural conversations that end with a confirmed appointment.
landing.example.structured.title: Appointment Created
landing.example.chat.1: Hi, I'd like to book an appointment for my dog.
landing.example.chat.2: I'd be happy to help! What service would you like to book?
landing.example.chat.4: Perfect. What's your dog's approximate weight?
landing.example.chat.6: Great! I have availability tomorrow at 9:00 AM, 11:15 AM, or 1:00 PM.
landing.example.chat.8: Perfect! Your appointment has been confirmed for tomorrow at 1:00 PM.
landing.control.title: Built for businesses that want to grow
landing.control.subtitle: Everything you need to serve customers, manage appointments, and monitor your business from one place.
landing.control.rows.1.title: Custom Configuration
landing.control.rows.1.desc: Every business has its own services, business hours, policies, and integrations.
landing.control.rows.2.title: Smart Automation
landing.control.rows.2.desc: Aamy answers questions, books appointments, and guides every customer automatically.
landing.control.rows.3.title: Reliable Information
landing.control.rows.3.desc: Every response is based on your business information, not generic AI answers.
landing.control.rows.4.title: Multi-Business Platform
landing.control.rows.4.desc: Manage multiple businesses while keeping customers, data, and settings completely separate.
hero.subtitle: Aamy answers phone calls, WhatsApp, Instagram, and Facebook messages, books appointments automatically, and remembers every conversation so your customers never have to start over.
hero.bullets.messages.title: Reply to messages
hero.bullets.messages.desc: Manage WhatsApp, Instagram, and Facebook from one place.
hero.bullets.calls.title: Answer calls
hero.bullets.calls.desc: Handle phone calls naturally while following your business rules.
hero.bullets.bookings.title: Book appointments
hero.bullets.bookings.desc: Check availability and confirm appointments automatically.
hero.bullets.memory.title: Remember customers
hero.bullets.memory.desc: Recognize returning customers, their language, and their history.
hero.bullets.reports.title: AI Reports
hero.bullets.reports.desc: Receive monthly insights, trends, and recommendations.
hero.trust: Configured with your real business information, services, and operating rules.
hero.bullets.omni.title: Omnichannel
hero.bullets.omni.desc: WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook, and phone calls in one platform.
hero.bullets.pixel.title: Smart CRM
hero.bullets.pixel.desc: Every conversation is organized so you can continue where it ended.
hero.bullets.booking.title: Automatic bookings
hero.bullets.booking.desc: Schedule appointments while respecting availability and business rules.
hero.bullets.intent.title: Customer memory
hero.bullets.intent.desc: Remember names, language, history, and previous services.
hero.tip.highlight1: It works like your best receptionist
benefits.title: Everything Aamy does for your business
benefits.subtitle: Serve more customers, book more appointments, and spend less time answering calls and messages.
benefits.cards.1.title: Never miss a customer
benefits.cards.1.desc: Aamy answers calls and messages even when you or your team are unavailable.
benefits.cards.2.title: Everything in one place
benefits.cards.2.desc: WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook, and phone calls organized in a single platform.
benefits.cards.3.title: Book appointments automatically
benefits.cards.3.desc: Check availability, suggest times, and confirm appointments automatically.
benefits.cards.4.title: Remember every customer
benefits.cards.4.desc: Keep customer history, preferred language, and previous conversations in one place.
benefits.cards.5.title: Learns your business
benefits.cards.5.desc: Works using your services, schedules, policies, and business rules instead of generic replies.
benefits.cards.6.title: Understand your results
benefits.cards.6.desc: Receive monthly AI reports with business insights, trends, and recommendations.
benefits.closing.highlight: Aamy works like your business receptionist
benefits.closing.after: so you can focus on serving your customers.
dashprev.subtitle: Monitor calls, messages, customers, appointments, reports, and business performance from a single place.
dashprev.bullets.1.title: All conversations
dashprev.bullets.1.desc: WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook, and phone calls organized by customer in real time.
dashprev.bullets.2.title: Customers & CRM
dashprev.bullets.2.desc: View customer history, appointments, preferred language, notes, and conversations.
dashprev.bullets.3.title: Appointments & Calendar
dashprev.bullets.3.desc: Manage bookings, availability, and appointment status from one screen.
dashprev.bullets.4.title: Business Metrics
dashprev.bullets.4.desc: Track calls, messages, bookings, conversion rate, and new vs. returning customers.
dashprev.bullets.5.title: AI Reports
dashprev.bullets.5.desc: Receive monthly insights with trends, time saved, and recommendations.
dashprev.mock.alt: Aamy dashboard showing conversations, customers, appointments, business metrics, and AI reports.
dashprev.closing: Everything happening in your business, organized in one place.
whofor.title: Is Aamy right for your business?
whofor.subtitle.before: Aamy is built for businesses that interact with customers every day and want to
whofor.subtitle.highlight: serve more customers, increase bookings, and save time
whofor.subtitle.after: without missing calls, messages, or appointments.
whofor.advanced.1.title: Available 24/7
whofor.advanced.1.desc: Answer calls and messages even when your business is closed or your team is busy.
whofor.advanced.2.title: Speaks your customer's language
whofor.advanced.2.desc: Automatically detects the customer's language and continues the conversation naturally.
whofor.advanced.3.title: Books appointments automatically
whofor.advanced.3.desc: Checks availability and confirms appointments following your business rules.
whofor.advanced.4.title: Remembers every customer
whofor.advanced.4.desc: Keeps customer history, conversations, and bookings so every interaction continues naturally.
whofor.fit.good.title: Perfect if...
whofor.fit.good.1: Your business receives calls or messages every day.
whofor.fit.good.2: You lose opportunities when nobody is available to answer.
whofor.fit.good.3: You want to automate bookings without losing the personal touch.
whofor.fit.good.4: You want one place to manage your customer interactions.
whofor.fit.bad.title: It may not be the best fit if...
whofor.fit.bad.1: Every conversation requires a technical evaluation before answering.
whofor.fit.bad.2: You don't want to automate any part of your customer service.
whofor.fit.bad.3: You prefer handling every call and message manually.
whofor.targets.1.title: Health & Beauty
whofor.targets.1.desc: Beauty salons, barbershops, aesthetic clinics, spas, tattoo studios, and medical offices.
whofor.targets.2.title: Local Services
whofor.targets.2.desc: Cleaning, HVAC, plumbing, electrical, remodeling, detailing, pet grooming, and more.
whofor.targets.3.title: Fitness & Education
whofor.targets.3.desc: Gyms, yoga studios, indoor cycling, academies, courses, and schools.
footer.tagline: Aamy.ai · The AI receptionist that answers calls, replies to messages, and books appointments 24/7.
footer.disclaimer: Aamy uses artificial intelligence to help businesses answer conversations, manage appointments, and automate customer interactions based on each business's configuration. Performance may vary depending on configuration, integrations, and platform usage.
demoWa.title: See how Aamy talks to your customers
demoWa.subtitle: Natural conversations that answer questions, book appointments, and help you convert more customers.

demoWa.msg.2: I'd be happy to help! 😊 What service would you like to book?
demoWa.msg.4: Perfect. I have availability tomorrow at 10:00 AM, 11:30 AM, or 2:00 PM. Which time works best for you?

trainingHelp.training.note.prefix: This help is based on your current flow:
trainingHelp.training.note.suffix: and Preview. Use shortcuts to jump to each section.
trainingHelp.common.writingTips.1: Be specific about what the assistant must do (sell, book, segment, etc.).
trainingHelp.common.writingTips.2: Paste key info as plain text. Avoid dash bullet lists.
trainingHelp.common.writingTips.3: Don’t say “see more on our website”: the assistant can’t browse external links.
trainingHelp.common.writingTips.4: Include prices, schedules, location, policies, and active promos.
trainingHelp.common.faqTips.1: Write questions the way a customer would (e.g., “How much does it cost?”).
trainingHelp.common.faqTips.2: Answer fully and kindly; avoid “it depends” or “contact us”.
trainingHelp.common.template:
Services and pricing: ...
Location: ...
Hours: ...
Policies: ...
Active promos: ...
Internal/payment links: ...
trainingHelp.cta.explanation.1: Configure CTAs (text + URL) by intent so the assistant suggests the right action when that intent is detected.
trainingHelp.cta.explanation.2: If there’s no CTA for the detected intent, the “global” CTA is used as a fallback.
trainingHelp.cta.explanation.3: The URL must start with http:// or https:// to be valid.
trainingHelp.cta.explanation.4: Recommendation: use short URLs and direct action pages (checkout, booking, confirm, map).
trainingHelp.cta.explanation.5: Tip: “global” works as the default CTA when the customer intent doesn’t match a more specific one.
trainingHelp.cta.template:
Intent: global
CTA text: Start today in 1 minute
CTA URL: https://yoursite.com/start

Intent: price
CTA text: See plans and pricing
CTA URL: https://yoursite.com/pricing

Intent: hours
CTA text: See available hours
CTA URL: https://yoursite.com/hours

Intent: location
CTA text: Get directions (Google Maps)
CTA URL: https://maps.google.com/?q=Your+Business

Intent: book
CTA text: Book my class now
CTA URL: https://yoursite.com/book

Intent: buy
CTA text: Buy my plan
CTA URL: https://yoursite.com/checkout

Intent: confirm
CTA text: Confirm my attendance
CTA URL: https://yoursite.com/confirm

Intent: class_interest
CTA text: See beginner classes
CTA URL: https://yoursite.com/get-started
trainingHelp.cta.examplesFitness:
Scenario: Customer asks "How much does it cost?"
→ Detected intent: price
→ Suggested CTA: "See plans and pricing" → https://synergyzone.fit/pricing

Scenario: "Where are you located?"
→ Intent: location
→ CTA: "Get directions (Google Maps)" → https://maps.google.com/?q=Synergy+Zone

Scenario: "I want to book for tomorrow"
→ Intent: book
→ CTA: "Book my class now" → https://synergyzone.fit/book
trainingHelp.cta.examplesBeauty:
Scenario: "How much are eyebrows?"
→ Intent: price
→ CTA: "See eyebrow & lash pricing" → https://andreacastrobeauty.com/pricing

Scenario: "Do you have availability today?"
→ Intent: hours
→ CTA: "See available hours" → https://andreacastrobeauty.com/book

Scenario: "Where are you?"
→ Intent: location
→ CTA: "Get directions (Google Maps)" → https://maps.google.com/?q=Andrea+Castro+Beauty
trainingHelp.sections.training.ctaByInte: Go to the “CTA by intent” section.
trainingHelp.sections.training.commonMis: Bullet-format info that gets skipped by the generator.
trainingHelp.sections.meta.quickSteps.2: Fill business info and welcome message.
trainingHelp.sections.meta.quickSteps.3: Add FAQs and Intents for the “meta” channel.
trainingHelp.sections.meta.faqsAndIntent: Use real examples from your DMs.
trainingHelp.sections.voice.quickSteps.2: Define what it must achieve (book, qualify, charge, etc.).
trainingHelp.sections.voice.quickSteps.4: Add Hints (common phrases separated by commas).
trainingHelp.sections.voice.bestPractice: In Hints, use short, common phrases (e.g., “I want to book, class price, address”).
trainingHelp.sections.campaignSms.quickS: Write the SMS content (you can include a link).
Schedule the send date and time.
trainingHelp.sections.campaignSms.tips.1: Be short and clear; include a call to action.
trainingHelp.sections.campaignEmail.quic: Write Subject and Message; add an image if you want.

- Answer frequently asked questions
- Provide pricing information
- Help book appointments
- Follow up if there is no response

Business name:
Business type:
Location:
Phone:

Main services:
- 

Hours:

Pricing (or how to check pricing):

Bookings / contact:
- 

Important policies (if any):
-
